name: Wyrm Claw
description:
The tip of a metallic dragon's claw is set into a band of silver. When you summon dragons using the claw, you must choose metallic dragons.

  • Armor After you cast a conjuration spell by activating the wyrm claw, you gain resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, and fire for the next minute.
  • Weapon After you cast a conjuration spell by activating the claw, you gain a Breath Weapon activity that takes 2 actions and deals 6d6 damage with a . Choose the area and type of damage when you use Breath Weapon: a that deals acid, electricity, or fire, or a that deals cold or fire. You can use this activity once before the end of your next turn.
